trigger.parentTitle: Box Office: Moana Sets Sail With $4.5 Million in Thursday Previews
trigger.overview: Disney’s “Moana” is setting sail at the box office once again. The beloved 2016 animated musical is the latest Disney film to get the live-action treatment. The new take on the film, starring Catherine Laga’aia as Moana and Dwayne Johnson reprising his role as the buff god Maui, has made $4.5 million in previews at [ ]
